---
title: "10. Bayesian Statistics"
---

# Bayesian Statistics {#sec-ch-10-bayesian}

Posterior inference via `brms` and Stan: priors, hierarchical models, posterior predictive checks, leave-one-out cross-validation, and Bayes factors. The chapter is opinionated: it treats Bayesian inference as a default, not an alternative.

This chapter contains **35 method pages** and **2 labs**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.qmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [Bayes Factors](bayes-factors.qmd) | `bayes-factors` |
| [Bayes' Theorem for Parameters](bayes-theorem-for-parameters.qmd) | `bayes-theorem-for-parameters` |
| [Bayesian ANOVA](bayesian-anova.qmd) | `bayesian-anova` |
| [Bayesian Hierarchical Models](bayesian-hierarchical-intro.qmd) | `bayesian-hierarchical-intro` |
| [Bayesian Hypothesis Testing](bayes-hypothesis-testing.qmd) | `bayes-hypothesis-testing` |
| [Bayesian Linear Regression](linear-regression-bayes.qmd) | `linear-regression-bayes` |
| [Bayesian Logistic Regression](logistic-regression-bayes.qmd) | `logistic-regression-bayes` |
| [Bayesian Mediation Analysis](bayesian-mediation.qmd) | `bayesian-mediation` |
| [Bayesian Meta-Analysis](bayesian-meta-analysis.qmd) | `bayesian-meta-analysis` |
| [Bayesian Mixed Models](bayesian-mixed-models.qmd) | `bayesian-mixed-models` |
| [brms Basics](brms-basics.qmd) | `brms-basics` |
| [Conjugate Priors](conjugate-priors.qmd) | `conjugate-priors` |
| [Credible Intervals](credible-intervals.qmd) | `credible-intervals` |
| [Divergences and Pairs Plots](divergences-pairs-plots.qmd) | `divergences-pairs-plots` |
| [Gibbs Sampling](gibbs-sampling.qmd) | `gibbs-sampling` |
| [Hamiltonian Monte Carlo](hamiltonian-monte-carlo.qmd) | `hamiltonian-monte-carlo` |
| [Highest Posterior Density Interval](hpd-interval.qmd) | `hpd-interval` |
| [Informative Priors](informative-priors.qmd) | `informative-priors` |
| [Jeffreys' Prior](jeffreys-prior.qmd) | `jeffreys-prior` |
| [Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation](loo-cv.qmd) | `loo-cv` |
| [Metropolis-Hastings](metropolis-hastings.qmd) | `metropolis-hastings` |
| [Posterior Mean and Variance](posterior-mean-variance.qmd) | `posterior-mean-variance` |
| [Posterior Predictive Checks](posterior-predictive-checks.qmd) | `posterior-predictive-checks` |
| [Prior Specification](prior-specification.qmd) | `prior-specification` |
| [R-hat and ESS Diagnostics](rhat-ess-diagnostics.qmd) | `rhat-ess-diagnostics` |
| [rstanarm](rstanarm.qmd) | `rstanarm` |
| [Stan: Introduction](stan-introduction.qmd) | `stan-introduction` |
| [The Beta-Binomial Model](beta-binomial-model.qmd) | `beta-binomial-model` |
| [The Gamma-Poisson Model](gamma-poisson-model.qmd) | `gamma-poisson-model` |
| [The Normal-Normal Model](normal-normal-model.qmd) | `normal-normal-model` |
| [The Posterior Predictive Distribution](posterior-predictive-distribution.qmd) | `posterior-predictive-distribution` |
| [The Savage-Dickey Density Ratio](savage-dickey-ratio.qmd) | `savage-dickey-ratio` |
| [tidybayes Workflow](tidybayes-workflow.qmd) | `tidybayes-workflow` |
| [WAIC](waic.qmd) | `waic` |
| [Weakly Informative Priors](weakly-informative-priors.qmd) | `weakly-informative-priors` |

## Labs

| # | Lab | Course / week / session |
|---|---|---|
| C4.11 | [Week 3, Session 1 â€” Bayesian thinking; Î± control vs decision error](labs/lab-bayesian-thinking-control-vs-decision-error.qmd) | Course 4, week 3, session 1 |
| C4.12 | [Week 3, Session 2 â€” brms / Stan, LOO, hierarchical models](labs/lab-brms-stan-loo-hierarchical-models.qmd) | Course 4, week 3, session 2 |
